jobs.title: Rewire a 3-bedroom flat before tenant move-in
jobs.summary: Need an experienced electrician for full rewiring, fittings check, and load balancing.
jobs.description: The flat is undergoing light renovation and requires complete rewiring for kitchen, living room, bedrooms, and external sockets. Client expects material list support, clean finishing, and testing before handover.

jobs.title: Build and install display shelving for boutique studio
jobs.summary: Looking for a carpenter to fabricate premium wall shelves and a front desk counter.
jobs.description: Project includes site measurement, fabrication, finishing, and installation of showroom shelving. Preference for artisans with experience in retail spaces and polished wood finishing.

jobs.title: Tailor needed for 60 staff uniforms
jobs.summary: Need delivery of branded uniforms with fitting corrections within two weeks.
jobs.description: This role covers measurement planning, sample creation, bulk sewing, and final adjustment for a hospitality team. Fabric and branding guide will be supplied by the client.

applications.coverNote: I handle residential rewiring and can inspect load distribution before work starts.
I have handled boutique shelves and custom counters for retail clients in Abuja.
I can manage the uniform production schedule and handle fitting updates before delivery.
